name: imap-mcp
description: Access and manage emails on any IMAP server — list, read, search, move, flag, and draft messages.
long_description: A complete IMAP email interface for AI assistants. Connect to any IMAP-compatible email server (Gmail, Outlook, etc.) and manage your inbox: browse mailboxes, list and read emails, search by sender/subject/date, move messages between folders, manage flags, and create drafts.

tools.name: list-mailboxes
tools.description: List all available mailboxes on the IMAP server

tools.name: list-emails
tools.description: List the most recent emails from a mailbox

tools.name: read-email
tools.description: Read a single email message by UID

tools.name: search-emails
tools.description: Search for emails using filter criteria

tools.name: move-email
tools.description: Move an email to a different mailbox

tools.name: flag-email
tools.description: Add or remove flags on an email

imap_username.title: Username
imap_username.description: IMAP login username (usually your email address)

imap_password.title: Password
imap_password.description: IMAP login password or app-specific password

imap_use_ssl.title: Use SSL/TLS
imap_use_ssl.description: Enable SSL/TLS encryption for the connection

imap_reject_unauthorized.title: Verify TLS Certificate
imap_reject_unauthorized.description: Reject connections with invalid TLS certificates

imap_drafts_folder.title: Drafts Folder
imap_drafts_folder.description: IMAP folder path for saving drafts (e.g., INBOX.Drafts)
